title: BEM-866 exact workflow presence
objective:
Run script:
"""
files = [
    Path('.github/workflows/claude_code_action_smoke.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/claude_internal_auditor_dispatcher.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/provider_adapter.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/mailbox_dispatcher.yml'),
]
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_exact_workflow_presence')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for f in files:
    text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if f.exists() else ''
    checks = {
        'exists': f.exists(),
        'has_workflow_dispatch': 'workflow_dispatch:' in text,
        'has_inputs': 'inputs:' in text,
        'has_trace_id': 'trace_id' in text,
        'has_from_claude': 'from_claude' in text,
        'has_git_push': 'git push' in text,
    }
    status = 'EXISTS' if f.exists() else 'MISSING'
    safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in f.name)
    true_flags = '_'.join(k for k,v in checks.items() if v) or 'NO_FLAGS'
    marker = outdir / (safe + '__' + status + '__' + true_flags + '.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-866 exact workflow presence\nFile: ' + str(f) + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n\nPrefix:\n' + text[:2500] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(marker))
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_EXACT_WORKFLOW_PRESENCE_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 exact workflow presence\nChecked: ' + str(len(files)) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('exact workflow presence checked')
"""
No issue comments.
